records.question: What orders were placed by customers whose customer_details is commodi?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN order_items ON orders.order_id = order_items.order_id
WHERE customers.customer_details = 'commodi'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT o.order_id
FROM Orders o
JOIN Customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN Order_Items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE c.customer_details = 'commodi'

records.question: What orders are currently On Road and were placed on or before 2002-12-06 14:13:30?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
WHERE orders.order_status = 'On Road' AND orders.date_order_placed <= '2002-12-06 14:13:30'
records.pred_sql: SELECT order_id FROM Orders WHERE order_status = 'On Road' AND date_order_placed <= '2002-12-06 14:13:30'

records.question: What orders were placed exactly on 2009-02-21 15:26:19 and have an order status of Shipped?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id
WHERE orders.date_order_placed = '2009-02-21 15:26:19' AND orders.order_status = 'Shipped'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Orders.order_id
FROM Orders
JOIN Customers ON Orders.customer_id = Customers.customer_id
WHERE Orders.date_order_placed = '2009-02-21 15:26:19'
  AND Orders.order_status = 'Shipped'

records.question: Which orders are currently On Road, have at least one Payed item, and were shipped on or after 1983-03-08 16:14:58?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN order_items ON orders.order_id = order_items.order_id
JOIN shipments ON orders.order_id = shipments.order_id
WHERE orders.order_status = 'On Road' AND shipments.shipment_date >= '1983-03-08 16:14:58' AND order_items.order_item_status = 'Payed'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT o.order_id
FROM Orders o
JOIN Customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN Order_Items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN Shipments s ON o.order_id = s.order_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'On Road'
  AND oi.order_item_status = 'Payed'
  AND s.shipment_date >= '1983-03-08 16:14:58'

records.question: Which orders placed on or before 2010-06-08 02:20:49 are currently packing, have shipment dates on or after 1982-01-24 12:13:16, come from customers named Hadley with details corrupti, and include order items with status Payed?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN order_items ON orders.order_id = order_items.order_id
JOIN shipments ON orders.order_id = shipments.order_id
WHERE customers.customer_name = 'Hadley' AND customers.customer_details = 'corrupti' AND order_items.order_item_status = 'Payed' AND orders.date_order_placed <= '2010-06-08 02:20:49' AND shipments.shipment_date >= '1982-01-24 12:13:16' AND orders.order_status = 'Packing'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT o.order_id
FROM Orders o
JOIN Customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN Order_Items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN Shipments s ON o.order_id = s.order_id
WHERE o.date_order_placed <= '2010-06-08 02:20:49'
  AND o.order_status = 'Packing'
  AND c.customer_name = 'Hadley'
  AND c.customer_details = 'corrupti'
  AND oi.order_item_status = 'Payed'
  AND s.shipment_date >= '1982-01-24 12:13:16'

records.question: Which orders with status Shipped were placed on or after 1974-06-24 22:10:26 by customer Hershel whose details are vel, and shipped on or after 1985-11-12 12:41:34 with shipment tracking number 2421?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN shipments ON orders.order_id = shipments.order_id
WHERE customers.customer_name = 'Hershel' AND shipments.shipment_date >= '1985-11-12 12:41:34' AND orders.date_order_placed >= '1974-06-24 22:10:26' AND shipments.shipment_tracking_number = '2421' AND customers.customer_details = 'vel' AND orders.order_status = 'Shipped'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT o.order_id
FROM Orders o
JOIN Customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN Shipments s ON o.order_id = s.order_id
WHERE o.date_order_placed >= '1974-06-24 22:10:26'
  AND o.order_status = 'Shipped'
  AND c.customer_name = 'Hershel'
  AND c.customer_details = 'vel'
  AND s.shipment_date >= '1985-11-12 12:41:34'
  AND s.shipment_tracking_number = '2421'

records.question: Which orders were placed exactly on 1974-06-24 22:10:26 by the customer whose name is Hershel and whose details are vel?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id
WHERE orders.date_order_placed = '1974-06-24 22:10:26' AND customers.customer_name = 'Hershel' AND customers.customer_details = 'vel'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Orders.order_id
FROM Orders
JOIN Customers ON Orders.customer_id = Customers.customer_id
WHERE Orders.date_order_placed = '1974-06-24 22:10:26'
  AND Customers.customer_name = 'Hershel'
  AND Customers.customer_details = 'vel'

records.question: Which orders that have associated customers, order items, and shipments have an order status exactly equal to 'Packing'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN order_items ON orders.order_id = order_items.order_id
JOIN shipments ON orders.order_id = shipments.order_id
WHERE orders.order_status = 'Packing'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Orders.order_id
FROM Orders
JOIN Customers ON Orders.customer_id = Customers.customer_id
JOIN Order_Items ON Orders.order_id = Order_Items.order_id
JOIN Shipments ON Orders.order_id = Shipments.order_id
WHERE Orders.order_status = 'Packing'

records.question: Which orders placed exactly on 1983-09-08 12:32:49 have an order status of On Road?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
WHERE orders.date_order_placed = '1983-09-08 12:32:49' AND orders.order_status = 'On Road'
records.pred_sql: SELECT order_id FROM Orders WHERE date_order_placed = '1983-09-08 12:32:49' AND order_status = 'On Road'

records.question: Which orders have an order status of On Road, include items that are Payed, and have shipments with tracking number 0182 sent on or after 1973-06-20 14:26:43?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN order_items ON orders.order_id = order_items.order_id
JOIN shipments ON orders.order_id = shipments.order_id
WHERE orders.order_status = 'On Road' AND shipments.shipment_date >= '1973-06-20 14:26:43' AND order_items.order_item_status = 'Payed' AND shipments.shipment_tracking_number = '0182'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT o.order_id
FROM Orders o
JOIN Order_Items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN Shipments s ON o.order_id = s.order_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'On Road'
  AND oi.order_item_status = 'Payed'
  AND s.shipment_date >= '1973-06-20 14:26:43'
  AND s.shipment_tracking_number = '0182'
